title: serruria altiscapa
intro: Serruria altiscapa, also known as the King's lily or alpine heath, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is a low-growing, shrub-like plant with white flowers that have a sweet, honey-like fragrance. The medicinal properties of Serruria altiscapa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Serruria altiscapa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
